title: commelina lyallii
intro: Commelina lyallii, also known as Lyall's dayflower, is a species of flowering plant in the dayflower family, Commelinaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Commelina lyallii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
